title: In Greenland, Protesters Denounce Opening of Bigger U.S. Consulate
summary_full: “Go away!” demonstrators yelled outside the newly opened diplomatic outpost, as guests inside nibbled on musk ox hot dogs.
summary_public: “Go away!” demonstrators yelled outside the newly opened diplomatic outpost, as guests inside nibbled on musk ox hot dogs.
